Title: Title
Custom emojis can be used throughout you: Custom emojis can be used throughout your workspace in documents, comments, and reactions.
These settings affect the way that your: These settings affect the way that your workspace appears to everyone on the team.
The logo is displayed at the top left of: Logo ditampilkan di atas kiri aplikasi.
The workspace name, usually the same as: Nama workspace, biasanya sama dengan nama perusahaan Anda.
A short description of your workspace.
Show your workspace logo, description, a: Show your workspace logo, description, and branding on publicly shared pages.
The side to display the table of content: The side to display the table of contents in relation to the main content.
Your workspace will be accessible at: Your workspace will be accessible at
Choose a subdomain to enable a login pag: Pilih subdomain untuk mengaktifkan halaman masuk hanya untuk tim Anda.
This is the screen that workspace member: Ini adalah layar yang akan dilihat pertama kali oleh anggota workspace saat mereka masuk.
When enabled documents have a separate e: When enabled documents have a separate editing mode by default instead of being always editable. This setting can be overridden by user preferences.
When enabled team members can add commen: Saat diaktifkan, anggota tim dapat menambahkan komentar ke dokumen.
You can delete this entire workspace inc: You can delete this entire workspace including collections, documents, and users.
Allow supported providers to be inserted: Allow supported providers to be inserted as interactive embeds in documents.
Enabled providers will appear in the edi: Enabled providers will appear in the editor slash menu and embed automatically when a compatible link is pasted. Existing embeds in documents will continue to display regardless of these settings.
A full export might take some time, cons: A full export might take some time, consider exporting a single document or collection. You may leave this page once the export has started – if you have notifications enabled, we will email a link to {{ userEmail }} when it’s complete.
Manage AI and integration features for y: Manage AI and integration features for your workspace.
Allow members to connect to this workspa: Allow members to connect to this workspace with MCP to read and write data.
Use the following endpoint to connect to: Use the following endpoint to connect to the MCP server from your app. Find out more about setup in the docs.
You can use these optional instructions: You can use these optional instructions to tell MCP clients how to use your knowledge base.
Use AI to get direct answers to question: Use AI to get direct answers to questions in search. This feature requires a paid license.
Groups can be used to organize and manag: Grup dapat digunakan untuk mengatur dan mengelola orang-orang di tim Anda.
Import a zip file of Markdown documents: Impor file zip dokumen Markdown (diekspor dari versi 0.67.0 atau sebelumnya)
Import a JSON data file exported from an: Impor file data JSON yang diekspor dari instance {{ appName }} lainnya
Quickly transfer your existing documents: Transfer dokumen, halaman, dan file Anda dengan cepat dari alat dan layanan lain ke {{appName}}. Anda juga dapat drag and drop dokumen HTML, Markdown, dan teks apa pun langsung ke Koleksi di aplikasi.
Configure a variety of integrations with: Configure a variety of integrations with third-party services.
Everyone that has signed into {{appName}: Everyone that has signed into {{appName}} is listed here. It’s possible that there are other users who have access through {{signinMethods}} but haven’t signed in yet.
Receive a notification whenever a new do: Terima pemberitahuan setiap kali dokumen baru diterbitkan
Receive a notification when a document y: Terima pemberitahuan saat dokumen langganan Anda diedit

Manage settings that affect your persona: Kelola pengaturan yang memengaruhi pengalaman pribadi Anda.
Choose the interface language. Community: Pilih bahasa antarmuka. Terjemahan komunitas diterima melalui <2>portal terjemahan kami</2> .

Show a hand cursor when hovering over in: Tampilkan kursor tangan saat mengarahkan kursor ke elemen interaktif.
Show line numbers on code blocks in docu: Tampilkan nomor baris pada blok kode di dokumen.
When enabled, documents have a separate: When enabled, documents have a separate editing mode. When disabled, documents are always editable when you have permission.
Automatically return to the document you: Secara otomatis kembali ke dokumen yang terakhir Anda lihat saat aplikasi dibuka kembali.
Auto-format text by replacing shortcuts: Auto-format text by replacing shortcuts with symbols, dashes, smart quotes, and other typographical elements.
Choose how unread notifications are indi: Choose how unread notifications are indicated on the app icon.
You may delete your account at any time,: Anda dapat menghapus akun Anda kapan saja, namun ingat bahwa ini tidak dapat dibatalkan
Unable to upload new profile picture: Tidak dapat mengunggah gambar profil baru
Manage how you appear to other members o: Kelola bagaimana Anda terlihat oleh anggota lain dari workspace.
Choose a photo or image to represent you: Pilih sebuah foto atau gambar yang mewakili diri Anda.
This could be your real name, or a nickn: Ini bisa berupa nama asli Anda, atau nama panggilan — bagaimanapun Anda ingin orang-orang merujuk Anda.
New users will first need to be invited: Pengguna baru pertama-tama harus diundang untuk membuat akun. Peran default dan Domain yang diizinkan tidak akan berlaku lagi.
Settings that impact the access, securit: Settings that impact the access, security, and content of your workspace.
Allow editors to invite other people to: Allow editors to invite other people to the workspace
Require members to be invited to the wor: Wajibkan anggota untuk diundang ke workspace sebelum mereka dapat membuat akun menggunakan SSO.
Peran pengguna default untuk akun baru. Mengubah setelan ini tidak memengaruhi akun pengguna yang ada.
Allow users to sign in with passkeys for: Allow users to sign in with passkeys for passwordless authentication
When enabled, documents can be shared pu: Saat diaktifkan, dokumen dapat dibagikan secara publik di internet oleh anggota workspace mana pun
When enabled, viewers can see download o: Saat diaktifkan, viewer dapat melihat opsi unduhan untuk dokumen
When enabled, users can delete their own: When enabled, users can delete their own account from the workspace

Allow editors to create new collections: Allow editors to create new collections within the workspace
Allow editors to create new workspaces: Allow editors to create new workspaces
You can globally enable and disable publ: Anda dapat mengaktifkan dan menonaktifkan berbagi dokumen publik secara global di pengaturan keamanan.
Documents that have been shared are list: Dokumen yang telah dibagikan tercantum di bawah ini. Siapa pun yang memiliki tautan publik dapat mengakses dokumen dalam versi read-only hingga tautan dicabut.
Templates help your team create consiste: Templates help your team create consistent and accurate documentation.

A confirmation code has been sent to you: A confirmation code has been sent to your email address, please enter the code below to permanently destroy this workspace.
Deleting the <1>{{workspaceName}}</1> wo: Deleting the <1>{{workspaceName}}</1> workspace will destroy all collections, documents, users, and associated data. You will be immediately logged out of {{appName}}.
Please note that workspaces are complete: Please note that workspaces are completely separated. They can have a different domain, settings, users, and billing.

Attributes allow you to define data to b: Attributes allow you to define data to be stored with your documents. They can be used to store custom properties, metadata, or any other structured information that is common across documents.
Use AI to directly answer searched quest: Use AI to directly answer searched questions using content in your workspace.

Manage the permissions and settings of a: Manage the permissions and settings of all collections in the knowledge base. As a workspace admin you can also administer private collections.
Automatically index and search document: Automatically index and search document content from {{appName}} inside <4>Glean</4> in realtime.
Details of the current {{appName}} licen: Details of the current {{appName}} license. To arrange contract renewal as expiry or seat limits approach or increase licensed seats please contact your account manager or email <4>priority@getoutline.com</4>.
